title: Mphasis is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mphasis is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Mphasis in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mphasis:
Mphasis is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis!
